Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Mar-26-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Burke Hansen, Esq. appeared for plaintiffs Christopher Kincaid, Ian Burney and Brooke Betancourte, who were not present at today's hearing.
No appearance by defendants Floor Factory, Inc. or Simple Floors, Inc., dba Simplefloors.com.

Default was entered against defendant Simple Floors, Inc., dba Simplefloors.com on January 13, 2009.
Default was entered against defendant Floor Factory, Inc. on March 24, 2009.
Doe defendants have not been dismissed.
Class action matter as prayed for in plaintiffs' complaint, but the Class has not been certified by the Court.

The Court cannot proceed with today's hearing for a multitude of reasons, including, but not limited to, the fact that plaintiffs are not present and the Class has not been certified.
Accordingly, this matter is taken OFF CALENDAR.
